title: Ultimate Survival Modpack
body:
Ultimate Survival – A Vanilla+ Experience

Love Minecraft’s survival gameplay but want a little more? Ultimate Survival enhances the core experience with carefully chosen mods that improve quality of life, expand mechanics, and make survival more engaging—without straying from the vanilla feel.

🔧 Quality of Life Improvements – Enjoy better inventory management, subtle UI enhancements, and optimizations that keep the game running smoothly while staying true to its roots.

⛏ Expanded Gameplay Features – Refined redstone mechanics, improved fishing, and small but meaningful tweaks to make survival more rewarding.

🔥 A True Survival Challenge – Balanced changes that enhance exploration, resource gathering, and combat, keeping the game fair but engaging for both casual and hardcore players.

No crazy tech, no overpowered magic—just a refined, immersive survival experience. If you love Minecraft’s original feel but want an upgrade, Ultimate Survival is the perfect modpack for you!
